title: Google Maps Lead Extractor
description: Search Google Maps for businesses, enrich with emails/phones/socials, score leads, and export structured data.

query.title: Search Query
query.description: Business type to search for (e.g. 'restaurants', 'plumbers', 'dental clinics')
query.sectionDescription: What to search for on Google Maps

maxResults.title: Maximum Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of businesses to extract

enrichWebsites.title: Enrich Websites
enrichWebsites.description: Visit each business website to extract emails, phone numbers, social links, and tech stack
enrichWebsites.sectionDescription: Extract additional contact info from business websites

minRating.title: Minimum Rating
minRating.description: Filter businesses by minimum Google rating (0 = no filter)
